attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.PROFILE_ID, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.SO_HEADER_ID, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.SO_LINE_ID, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.GLOBAL_NAME, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.ORG_ID, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.VSOE_ACCT_SCOPE, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.CURR_EITF_PERC, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.CURR_SOP_PERC, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.PREV_EITF_PERC, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.PREV_SOP_PERC, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.LINE_TYPE, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.SERVICE_TYPE, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.MESSAGE, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.ATTRIBUTE1, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.ATTRIBUTE2, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.ATTRIBUTE3, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.ATTRIBUTE4, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.ATTRIBUTE5, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.ATTRIBUTE6, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.ATTRIBUTE7, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.ATTRIBUTE8, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.ATTRIBUTE9, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.ATTRIBUTE10, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.ATTRIBUTE11, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.ATTRIBUTE12, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.ATTRIBUTE13, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.ATTRIBUTE14, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.ATTRIBUTE15, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.CREATION_DATE, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.CREATED_BY, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.LAST_UPDATED_BY, NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE.LAST_UPDATED_LOGIN 
FROM
 NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE_MV NGCCRM_SOL_AC_SCOPE
WHERE LAST_UPDATED_DATE > TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
